# Known Conformance Issues

This document is generated from `tools/conformance/known-issues.ron`. Edit the RON catalog, not this file.

## DECODE

### `jbig2dec` / `TT8`

- Expected: `FAIL containing "color segments (NYI)"`
- Upstream: jbig2dec: AMD3 colour palette segments are unimplemented; the decoder prints this message from its own page-segment handler
- Evidence: vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_page.c:124 prints `page segment indicates use of color segments (NYI)`
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)

### `system-binary` / `TT8`

- Expected: `FAIL containing "color segments (NYI)"`
- Upstream: Same as jbig2dec row; the system jbig2dec is expected to be the same Artifex decoder family
- Evidence: Observed system-binary row emits the same `color segments (NYI)` message as vendor/jbig2dec/jbig2_page.c:124
- Vendor pin: `GitSha { path: vendor/jbig2dec, sha: 6ecb04980813d693234190021bd1cf874c05b1b4 }`
- Vendor pin status: ok (vendor/jbig2dec@6ecb04980813)
